name: Bishop Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter. Stir in the flour and 1 cup of chopped pecans. Continue stirring until a thick paste is formed, with no visible flour lumps.
2. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 13x10 inch baking pan. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes.
3. Prepare the first filling by combining the cream cheese, confectioners sugar, and 1 cup of whipped topping in a mixing bowl. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth, about 2-3 minutes.
4. Spoon the mixture into the cooled crust. Smooth the top with a spatula.
5. In another mixing bowl, combine the instant chocolate pudding mix and milk according to package instructions. Stir well.
6. Pour the pudding mixture over the cream cheese layer.
7. Once the chocolate layer begins to firm up slightly, add more whipped topping until there is an additional 1/2 inch (1 cm) layer above the chocolate.
8. Sprinkle with remaining chopped pecans.
9. Chill for at least 3 hours before serving.
